summary: Data Quality & Accounting FRESH RUN test suite completed for Safe-Spend API. 21/21 tests passed covering all 7 sections: Cross-escrow balance consistency (3 tests), Spend flow vs ledger & audit (5 tests), Daily/Weekly/Monthly tracking integrity (3 tests), Stripe reconciliation - simulated (3 tests), Idempotency & double-spend protection with 5 repeated requests (3 tests), Multi-currency N/A (1 test), and Orphan detection & referential integrity (3 tests). All accounting math verified correct.

tests: 1.1: Create 3 escrows for fresh Org A (escA1: $500, escA2: $200, escA3: $0)
1.2: Database check - balance_cents matches funding, total_funded_cents correct
1.3: Org isolation - Org B cannot access Org A's escrows (404)
2.1: Create policy P1 with per-tx=10000, daily=30000, monthly=100000, vendors=[Anthropic,OpenAI]
2.2: Execute spends - S1:5000 approved, S2:7500 approved, S3:25000 denied (per-tx), S4:5000 denied (vendor)
2.3: Ledger check - balance=37500, total_spent=12500, total_denied=30000 VERIFIED
2.4: Spend requests balance_before/after chain integrity VERIFIED
2.5: Audit events - spend.approved and spend.denied events exist VERIFIED
3.1: On escA2, create policy (per-tx=10000), execute T1:2000, T2:3000, T3:5000
3.2: Daily tracking verified: total=10000, count=3
3.3: Weekly and monthly tracking tables match: total=10000, count=3
4.1: Funding events - escrow total_funded_cents verified (simulated funding doesn't create funding_events)
4.2: Stripe is simulated - audit event shows source='simulated'
4.3: N/A - Stripe dashboard reconciliation not applicable
5.1: Send spend with same idempotency_key exactly 5 times - all returned same ID
5.2: Exactly 1 row in spend_requests with that key
5.3: Balance decreased by exactly 1000 once (not 5000)
6: Multi-currency - N/A (USD only currently)
7.1: No orphaned spend_requests (all reference valid escrows)
7.2: No orphaned approvals (all reference valid spend_requests)
7.3: No orphaned audit_events for organizations

critical_code_review_comments: Rules engine correctly evaluates per-tx limit (10000) before daily limit (30000) - S3 denied for per-tx not daily
Idempotency protection working correctly with 5 repeated requests - only 1 spend created
Balance tracking is accurate with balance_before/after chain integrity maintained
Audit events properly logged for all spend operations (approved and denied)
Daily/Weekly/Monthly tracking tables correctly updated and match spend_requests aggregation
Referential integrity maintained - no orphaned records in any table
Stripe funding is SIMULATED - no real Stripe calls made, audit shows source='simulated'
seed_data_creation: Created 2 fresh test organizations with unique timestamp IDs, 3 escrow accounts (escA1: $500, escA2: $200, escA3: $0), 2 policies, and multiple spend requests for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Data Quality & Accounting FRESH RUN completed. All 21 tests passed. Key findings: 1) Balance math is correct (funded - spent = balance), 2) total_denied_cents tracks denied amounts correctly (30000 = 25000 + 5000), 3) Daily/weekly/monthly tracking tables match spend_requests, 4) Idempotency prevents double-spend even with 5 repeated requests, 5) No orphaned records. The rules engine evaluates per-transaction limit before daily limit, so a 25000 cent spend is denied for per-tx limit (10000) before reaching daily limit check. Stripe funding is SIMULATED.

data_quality_verification.balance_consistency: VERIFIED - All escrow balances match funded - spent
data_quality_verification.audit_trail: VERIFIED - All spends have corresponding audit events
data_quality_verification.daily_tracking: VERIFIED - Matches spend_requests aggregation (10000 cents, 3 transactions)
data_quality_verification.weekly_tracking: VERIFIED - Matches spend_requests aggregation (10000 cents, 3 transactions)
data_quality_verification.monthly_tracking: VERIFIED - Matches spend_requests aggregation (10000 cents, 3 transactions)
data_quality_verification.idempotency: VERIFIED - 5 repeated requests created exactly 1 spend, balance decreased by 1000 once
data_quality_verification.referential_integrity: VERIFIED - No orphaned records in any table

mocked_apis_list: Stripe funding simulation via /fund endpoint - audit shows source='simulated'
